description.ko: 무한한 공허의 가장자리에서 빛 없는 타원이 라벤더 별먼지를 고요한 우주의 찬가로 모은다.
description.en: A silent oval of absence gathers lavender star dust into a cosmic hymn at the edge of the infinite void.

prompt: VOID-3 cosmic deep vision of an immense, starless oval absence suspended off-center like a sealed wound in space, surrounded by a translucent nebula membrane rather than a vortex. Layers of #0D0221 velvet darkness press behind thin #3D1A78 violet gas sheets, while high-density #E6E6FA star dust gathers in slow, tide-like arcs across the foreground. Tiny distant stars appear muted and partially erased at the rim of the absence, with delicate #7B68EE ion filaments tracing fragile cracks through the lavender haze. The scene has no spacecraft, no planets, no central black hole; it feels like a sacred negative constellation discovered in the infinite void, mysterious cosmic horror majesty, silent abyssal scale, deep space nebula photography, soft volumetric glow, restrained contrast, very slow drifting particles.
